category_sources: Official freedesktop GitLab project describes makedepend as a utility to parse C source files to make dependency lists for Makefiles.
display_name_sources: Official X.Org/freedesktop GitLab project name is makedepend.
docs_sources: Official freedesktop GitLab repository exposes a README for makedepend; no separate dedicated documentation site was found in official sources.
repo_sources: Official freedesktop GitLab project is xorg/util/makedepend.
tags_sources: Official freedesktop GitLab project says it parses C source files to make dependency lists for Makefiles.
